last_episode_to_air.name: Gods Assemble
last_episode_to_air.overview: In the aftermath, both the Demon Defense Force and the Thunder Gods prepare for what comes next.

name: Chained Soldier
overview: Destructive monsters from the Mato dimension threaten the earth, while women gifted with powers from Peaches try to stop them. But to save the world, Yuuki must be willing to become Chief Kyoka's servant both on the battlefield and at home.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview:
As graduation nears, Yuuki Wakura fears an ordinary future—until he’s suddenly pulled into the world of Mato: an alternate dimension filled with monsters called Shuuki. To combat the threat of the Shuuki, the all-female Demon Defense Force, empowered by Mato fruits granting supernatural abilities to women, was formed.

Yuuki in his dire situation is saved by Kyouka Uzen, the chief of the Demon Defense Force's seventh unit. Despite Kyouka's impeccable skills in battle, she has long been held back by her ability, Slave. It allows Kyouka to put a living being under her control, but the Shuuki that she had enslaved until now had all proven to be weak.

When Yuuki and Kyouka become surrounded by a horde of Shuuki, Kyouka resorts to using her ability on Yuuki. To her surprise, Yuuki's slave form is much more powerful than she could have imagined. Believing the young man to be the key to unlocking her true potential, Kyouka invites Yuuki to join the Demon Defense Force.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: The fight against the Shuuki continues as Chained Soldier returns with more monsters, supernatural action, and spicy 'rewards'! In a world where only women can wield the power of supernatural "Peaches," which grant unusual powers to those who eat them, Yuuki (despite his gender) joins the Demon Defense Squad to combat evil demons called Shuuki from destroying human civilization.
